name: Wendy - Personal knight
description:
"You smell so good~ I want to bite you, but only with your permission~"

Artist: I find it on pinterest, I appreciate if someone write artist

Oh, yea it's dead dove so be aware!

Yapping: Hello everyone! And happy Halloween! (I know I'm late, but better late than never!) How you been doing? I was busy, all that week was on courses ×_×. But it was fun, I mean of course i'm stupid like a rock but moment when you feel that you understand it's... it's... fucking awesome! And thank you all for 560 followers❤️❤️❤️ sometimes I'm feeling like didn't deserve this but it's fine. Like always have a good day, good evening and good night :p
creator: Tonarion
